subject: Video of the day: Ivanka Trump pushes for women’s empowerment in Latin America
body:
This week, Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump is in South America, with visits to Colombia, Argentina, and Paraguay to promote a... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5cf06be637&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 5, 2019
---
| | |
# **An update on Hurricane Dorian**

**The Trump Administration** is closely monitoring Hurricane Dorian as the storm makes its way up the Eastern seaboard. As always, the safety of American families remains the top priority for President Donald J. Trump and the Federal Government.

**The President** asks all residents of Georgia, South Carolina, North Carolina, and Virginia to follow the instructions of their local officials this week. Yesterday, he announced that at the request of the Government of the Bahamas, the United States is sending additional support to help with ongoing recovery efforts. Both U.S. Coast Guard and Customs and Border Protection officials are on the ground in the Bahamas now conducting rescue operations. More relief will be provided in the coming days.

[Stay prepared: Up-to-date FEMA resources and information on Hurricane Dorian](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a6b7454b59&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: Ivanka Trump pushes for women’s empowerment in Latin America**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bb5d4fbdd5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **This week,** Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump is in South America, with visits to Colombia, Argentina, and Paraguay to promote a key White House project. The Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative, or [W-GDP](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=09dc0dbd0b&e=3ee4985eea), aims to help 50 million women worldwide achieve their full economic potential by 2025.

**In Bogota, Colombia,** Ms. Trump began her trip by launching the new Academy of Women Entrepreneurs. The first participants of the new initiative were a dynamic group of 40 female leaders, each of whom will have a tremendous impact on their local economies. They embody the very spirit of W-GDP.

**The new academy** is “designed to equip women with the practical skills they need to create sustainable businesses and to participate more fully in the global economy,” Ms. Trump said. “This is particularly important in Colombia, where women play an increasingly critical role in the country’s economic development and continued transition to peace.”

**Yesterday,** Ms. Trump met with Venezuelan members of Interim President Juan Guaido’s coalition, reaffirming President Trump’s continued support for the Venezuelan people in their pursuit of democracy and freedom from the Maduro regime. The delegation also spoke with Venezuelan and Colombian migrant women to hear about their collective experiences and struggles. Before departing, Ms. Trump had a major announcement: $120 million in additional assistance from the U.S. will be going to countries in the region that are providing a safe haven for Venezuela’s refugees.

**“We stand** with the people of Venezuela in their struggle to restore democracy, freedom and rule of law. It was deeply moving to meet female leaders of the Guaido coalition as well as some of the women impacted most by the brutal Maduro dictatorship,” she said.

[In photos: Ivanka Trump visits woman-owned organic strawberry farm in Colombia.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb07af014f&e=3ee4985eea)

**More:** [Ivanka Trump announces $120 million in US aid for displaced Venezuelans](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=365b8e116b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
# **Basketball legend Jerry West receives Medal of Freedom**

**Today,** President Trump presented the Presidential Medal of Freedom to Jerry Alan West, one of the all-time greatest basketball players and leaders in the game.

**Jerry West** became known as “Mr. Clutch,” a nickname that was well-earned during his 14 seasons in the NBA—all of them with the Los Angeles Lakers. His career accolades speak for themselves: West made the All-Star team each year he played and led the 1972 Lakers to their first championship in Los Angeles. He was inducted into the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame just a few years later.

**Off the court,** West became a legendary NBA General Manager, credited with building two separate dynasties for his Lakers—once in the 1980s and again in the 2000s.

[Watch President Trump honor basketball legend Jerry West in the Oval Office.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4cc261eb2b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

name: Andrew Yang
subject: I’ve met the man who will defeat Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
For the sake of our democracy, we have to defeat Lindsey Graham in 2020. | [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/1154?t=1&akid=94%2E377263%2EWwOkNY) Friend -- For the sake of our democracy, we have to defeat Lindsey Graham in 2020. And Jaime Harrison is the man who is going to do it. In the past, the argument could be made that Lindsey Graham was a statesman -- a Senator who put country over party and worked across party lines. Those days are over. The truth is he stopped working for the people of South Carolina a long time ago. Senator Graham traded his moral compass and sold out his constituents to the highest bidders -- taking millions from special interests. He went from being #NeverTrump to defending Trump’s most bizarre and despicable statements and policies. That’s why I’m so grateful that a man like Jaime Harrison stepped up to defeat him. Jaime and I believe that South Carolina and the United States should work for ALL Americans, not just the wealthy. [I believe Jaime Harrison has the vision and principles that South Carolinians so desperately need to live dignified lives and provide for their families. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Jaime Harrison’s campaign for Senate so we can fight for our country’s future together?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/4231?t=2&akid=94%2E377263%2EWwOkNY) | [CHIP IN](https://act.yang2020.com/go/4232?t=3&akid=94%2E377263%2EWwOkNY)
---
\- Andrew
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/4237?t=4&akid=94%2E377263%2EWwOkNY)

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Stand with Dreamers (add your name)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
**[Add your name: Tell the Senate to pass the American Dream and Promise Act now.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c30/42ab3cf4/613498bf/135d7fec/2503308136/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-dreamers?source=em190905&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Peter,
Dreamers are Americans. They deserve to be a part of the future of the country they call home. That's why I introduced the Dream Act in 2001 and have fought for 19 years to get it passed.
But Republicans in Congress have repeatedly--and shamefully--refused to act. That's why President Obama created DACA--because Dreamers should not be deported, period.
President Trump made the unconscionable decision to end that program two years ago today.
**[Now more than ever, we must do the right thing and stand with our Dreamers. Join me and call on the Senate to immediately pass the American Dream and Promise Act.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c30/42ab3cf4/613498bf/135d7fec/2503308136/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-dreamers?source=em190905&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Dreamers are Americans in fact, and they should be Americans under our laws.
The overwhelming majority of Americans support protecting Dreamers, because they know that Dreamers are part of our communities and they belong here. But because of President Trump's attacks on DACA, Dreamers are forced to live with the fear and uncertainty of deportation.
**[The House has already passed the American Dream and Promise Act--now, the Senate must take action to protect our Dreamers. Add your name now to show your support.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c30/42ab3cf4/613498bf/135d7fec/2503308136/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-dreamers?source=em190905&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Sign the Petition](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c30/42ab3cf4/613498bf/135d7fec/2503308136/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-dreamers?source=em190905&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

* * *

name: Mike Siegel
subject: Working together for a Green New Deal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9696130/96244577/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmFjZWUyNS1hZWQwLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jS_X7AsfO9iFd9uXroRhErGdIZUcHM3ghEBVCBQBQao=&emci=f5e9b61e-aed0-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=8bacee25-aed0-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=6233172)

Peter, **Our planet is in trouble: rising temperatures and increased natural disasters are endangering life as we know it. ** The crisis demands our attention, and my campaign is committed to doing our share. On September 21, we are holding a town hall to discuss how environmental, labor, and youth groups can work together to pass a Green New Deal. We must transition from a fossil fuel economy, and provide new opportunities for American workers.** ** [**In order to promote a Green New Deal here in Texas, we need your help. Can you chip in right now so we can continue to fight for climate justice?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9696131/96244578/1155761749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmFjZWUyNS1hZWQwLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jS_X7AsfO9iFd9uXroRhErGdIZUcHM3ghEBVCBQBQao=&refcode=em090519)
_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9696132/96244580/1155761749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmFjZWUyNS1hZWQwLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jS_X7AsfO9iFd9uXroRhErGdIZUcHM3ghEBVCBQBQao=&refcode=em090519)_
Climate change results from humans burning coal, oil and natural gas, combined with deforestation and other causes. On a planet with billions of people, and ever-increasing human development, we need our federal government to take the lead, to reduce carbon emissions and chart a path toward sustainability. We also know our economy is in trouble. A handful of billionaires control as much wealth as half the country. We’ve lost good jobs, in manufacturing and other industries, that allowed workers to support their families. Too many of us are working nonstop, for little pay, and are barely scraping by. The Green New Deal addresses both the environment and the need for good jobs. Let’s use the power of our government to build a healthier future. Let’s invest in renewable energy, and put Americans to work in the process. Let’s make our homes more energy efficient; let’s clean up polluted waterways and industrial areas; let’s create industries inside the United States that will meet the needs of the 21st century.

**[Let's pass a Green New Deal!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9696133/96244582/1155761749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmFjZWUyNS1hZWQwLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jS_X7AsfO9iFd9uXroRhErGdIZUcHM3ghEBVCBQBQao=&refcode=em090519)**

For the people,

clean_body: Peter, Our planet is in trouble: rising temperatures and increased natural disasters are endangering life as we know it. The crisis demands our attention, and my campaign is committed to doing our share. On September 21, we are holding a town hall to discuss how environmental, labor, and youth groups can work together to pass a Green New Deal. We must transition from a fossil fuel economy, and provide new opportunities for American workers. Climate change results from humans burning coal, oil and natural gas, combined with deforestation and other causes. On a planet with billions of people, and ever-increasing human development, we need our federal government to take the lead, to reduce carbon emissions and chart a path toward sustainability. We also know our economy is in trouble. A handful of billionaires control as much wealth as half the country. We’ve lost good jobs, in manufacturing and other industries, that allowed workers to support their families. Too many of us are working nonstop, for little pay, and are barely scraping by. The Green New Deal addresses both the environment and the need for good jobs. Let’s use the power of our government to build a healthier future. Let’s invest in renewable energy, and put Americans to work in the process. Let’s make our homes more energy efficient; let’s clean up polluted waterways and industrial areas; let’s create industries inside the United States that will meet the needs of the 21st century. For the people, Mike Siegel G M T Y | | Detect languageAfrikaansAlbanianAmharicArabicArmenianAzerbaijaniBasqueBelarusianBengaliBosnianBulgarianCatalanCebuanoChichewaChinese (Simplified)Chinese name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: We start with background checks on all sales, an assault weapons and high capacity magazine ban, and red flag laws
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9700365/96281265/-1916338439?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGY2OWQxYi1iZWQwLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X-Gd3vM6UpSAa8UPeaKEAnzgqcXo08bxX3zEU-nRIr0=&refcode=emheader_090619) | | Friend,

There have been **289 mass shootings** in the United States in the first **245 days of 2019.**

If David Perdue and Mitch McConnell continue to go along with the NRA’s wishes and block any action, we can expect more than 500 mass shootings between now and January 3, 2021. That’s the date the next Congress will be sworn in – **and the Senate must have a Democratic majority if we are to make any kind of progress to solve gun violence.**

We will eliminate the filibuster. We will take on the Republican senators who continue to accept what is essentially blood money from the NRA, and we will pass common sense gun safety legislation. But first, we need to defeat David Perdue.

**[The NRA-backed National Republican Senate Committee has already come after me, and their attacks will only escalate. Can you make a $5 donation to help us respond by building this campaign across all 159 of Georgia’s counties?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9700367/96281269/-1916338439?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGY2OWQxYi1iZWQwLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X-Gd3vM6UpSAa8UPeaKEAnzgqcXo08bxX3zEU-nRIr0=&refcode=em090619-b&refcode2=48f69d1b-bed0-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349)**

I believe responsible gun owners must be part of the solution to our gun violence epidemic. That’s why there is no difference in the message I deliver, whether I’m speaking to March For Our Lives activists in Roswell or gun owners in Bainbridge. When you step away from the dysfunction of Washington, you find surprising consensus over what needs to be done. There is widespread agreement to:
* ✅ Ban assault weapons
* ✅ Require background checks on all gun sales
* ✅ Ban high capacity magazines
* ✅ Implement red flag laws

Let me be clear. David Perdue and Mitch McConnell’s failure to allow a vote on any reasonable gun reform legislation is an outrage. Putting the interests of gun manufacturers before the lives of their constituents violates the public trust that we are supposed to place in our leaders, but is so lacking today.

I want you to imagine a government that actually serves you.

**[Donate to my campaign for U.S. Senate today and help build our statewide campaign to serve Georgia.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9700369/96281273/-1916338439?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGY2OWQxYi1iZWQwLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X-Gd3vM6UpSAa8UPeaKEAnzgqcXo08bxX3zEU-nRIr0=&refcode=em090619-b&refcode2=48f69d1b-bed0-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349)**

Thank you for making such a pivotal difference in our campaign.

Yours truly
Teresa ** ** ** ** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9700371/96281276/-1916338439?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGY2OWQxYi1iZWQwLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X-Gd3vM6UpSAa8UPeaKEAnzgqcXo08bxX3zEU-nRIr0=&refcode=em090619-b&refcode2=48f69d1b-bed0-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349)**

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm reading your responses TONIGHT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team -- With the debate less than one week away, time is running out if you want to have your voice counted in our official debate survey. [**You 're one of our campaign's top supporters so I want to hear from you. Will you take two minutes to submit your response to my debate prep survey today?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190906_CB_20190906-su-CB-debatesurvey-actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks to this grassroots team, I'm one of only ten candidates who met the threshold to participate in the third DNC debate -- I'll share the stage with Amy Klobuchar, Pete Buttigieg, Bernie Sanders, Joe Biden, Elizabeth Warren, Kamala Harris, Andrew Yang, Beto O'Rourke, and Julian Castro. These moments are a major opportunity for an underdog campaign like ours. This will be the first time we'll be on stage together debating the issues. My campaign is working through our debate prep materials, and as a top supporter, I want to make sure your input is included. [**This is the most effective way to have your thoughts shared directly with me and our campaign. So team, what issues do you most want to hear about in the next debate?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190906_CB_20190906-su-CB-debatesurvey-actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks for your input,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190906_CB_20190906-su-CB-debatesurvey-actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

subject: Want to have dinner with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Be one of the FIRST patriots to enter. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=43aa97b5235a36117ceae5c392e5db67b7d9a74a1983f653a33283ba63308fe7882f9e4d09b9c5540152627ad8813a8d192fe4727995e66c)
---

Friend,

There has never been a time in the history of our country that the media was so fraudulent, fake, or corrupt!

_We 've faced lie after lie, day after day, but through it all, you've never left my side._ To thank you for your unwavering support, I want to offer you a special, once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

I've got a dinner coming up, and I want YOU to be my special guest with **VIP ALL-ACCESS.**

My team will cover the flight, hotel, and meal for you and a guest of your choice - all you have to do is enter.

We'll even take a photo together, so we can both remember the incredible night forever.

Right now, we're not in good shape. Our August donations dropped by 16% -- that's really alarming when you consider that Senator Hassan only won by 1,017 votes.
Regaining our momentum is critical, everyone. [**Otherwise, we lose all hope for combatting climate change, preserving _Roe v. name: Michael Bennet
subject: equal is not equal in American education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
We need a bold commitment to change the structures that reinforce inequality | |
---
| Friends, in our education system today, equal is not equal when one group of kids has access to opportunities that another does not, through no fault of their own.

[We need a bold commitment to change the structures that reinforce inequality. That's why I released a sweeping new plan yesterday to ensure that every kid can reach their full potential.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafca/134673f2/bf512ef/69962073/118342893/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/Equal-Means-Equal?source=EM_PET_B1_090619_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

In my Administration, we will make a commitment that by 2028, every child, regardless of circumstance, will be at the center of a community offering them a real chance to flourish personally and prosper financially.

[Friends, add your name to my petition if you agree that equal must be equal if America's children are to reach their full potential.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafca/134673f2/bf512ef/69962073/118342893/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/Equal-Means-Equal?source=EM_PET_B1_090619_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

---
| [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafca/134673f2/bf512ef/69962073/118342893/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/Equal-Means-Equal?source=EM_PET_B1_090619_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
---
(You can read the full plan by clicking [here.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafca/134673f2/bf512ef/69962072/118342893/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://michaelbennet.com/education/"))
[When a child is born in America today, what kind of life should they be able to lead?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafca/134673f2/bf512ef/69962073/118342893/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/Equal-Means-Equal?source=EM_PET_B1_090619_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

We need to build a new American Dream, where everyone can reach their full potential regardless of who they are or where they live.

It requires a vision and commitment, that I will make as president, to work across the country to transform our schools and economy to give every kid a real shot at success.

This starts with the establishment of 500 Regional Opportunity Compacts, which will connect the dots between what is taught in schools, what skills local employers need, and how we support students so they can enter the workforce prepared and participate in society as informed citizens.

We're also going to:

* Establish free preschool

* Support longer school days and years

* Establish free community college and debt-free public college

* Increase teacher pay and tackle K-12 funding disparities

* Lower loan payment caps

* And more

It's time to make equal truly equal. I am ready to make sure every kid has access to opportunity. It's time to end the rampant inequality in our education system.

[I'm ready to get to work, but I need your support. Will you add your name to my petition and join the fight to give every kid, no matter who they are or where they're from, a real shot at success?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafca/134673f2/bf512ef/69962073/118342893/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/Equal-Means-Equal?source=EM_PET_B1_090619_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

---

---
| [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafca/134673f2/bf512ef/69962073/118342893/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/Equal-Means-Equal?source=EM_PET_B1_090619_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
---
We're building the future our children deserve - thanks for joining the fight.

Michael

clean_body: We need a bold commitment to change the structures that reinforce inequality | | | Friends, in our education system today, equal is not equal when one group of kids has access to opportunities that another does not, through no fault of their own. "=" In my Administration, we will make a commitment that by 2028, every child, regardless of circumstance, will be at the center of a community offering them a real chance to flourish personally and prosper financially. "=" | "=" (You can read the full plan by clicking "") "=" We need to build a new American Dream, where everyone can reach their full potential regardless of who they are or where they live. It requires a vision and commitment, that I will make as president, to work across the country to transform our schools and economy to give every kid a real shot at success. This starts with the establishment of 500 Regional Opportunity Compacts, which will connect the dots between what is taught in schools, what skills local employers need, and how we support students so they can enter the workforce prepared and participate in society as informed citizens. We're also going to: Establish free preschool Support longer school days and years Establish free community college and debt-free public college Increase teacher pay and tackle K-12 funding disparities Lower loan payment caps And more It's time to make equal truly equal. I am ready to make sure every kid has access to opportunity. It's time to end the rampant inequality in our education system. "=" | "=" We're building the future our children deserve - thanks for joining the fight. Michael | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

name: Health Care Alerts (Thompson HQ)
subject: add your name
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
The GOP won't be deterred in its attacks on the Affordable Care Act.

[We must step up now and demand Congress protect Americans with pre-existing conditions. Add your name now ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/XL7dX5xxS34PiMinrVsTPDB96KQPpOIzyw0G3Dnh4Dk=/4Zn98nA-5ASdPvSzz-7FxyB3T3_9Oy-g96P1wliYZtc=?code=thompson&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmt-aca-up%3Frefcode%3DMT_EM_JA_WL_190906_1_2%26amount%3D10.00%26recurring%3Dtrue)

Begin Forwarded Message:
> [](https://act.myngp.com/el/XL7dX5xxS34PiMinrVsTPDB96KQPpOIzyw0G3Dnh4Dk=/4Zn98nA-5ASdPvSzz-7FxyB3T3_9Oy-g96P1wliYZtc=?code=thompson&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmt-aca-up%3Frefcode%3DMT_EM_JA_WL_190906_1_2%26amount%3D10.00%26recurring%3Dtrue)
> Peter - The Affordable Care Act (ACA) is under threat yet again. Currently, the Trump administration is allowing states to sell health insurance plans that do not protect Americans with pre-existing conditions - and more than a dozen Republican attorneys general have filed a lawsuit in hopes of dismantling the ACA entirely.
>
> [The GOP will stop at nothing in their attacks on affordable health care. That's why we must act now. Add your name and tell Congress to protect coverage for Americans with pre-existing conditions! ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/XL7dX5xxS34PiMinrVsTPDB96KQPpOIzyw0G3Dnh4Dk=/4Zn98nA-5ASdPvSzz-7FxyB3T3_9Oy-g96P1wliYZtc=?code=thompson&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmt-aca-up%3Frefcode%3DMT_EM_JA_WL_190906_1_2%26amount%3D10.00%26recurring%3Dtrue)
>
> [DEMAND ACTION](https://act.myngp.com/el/XL7dX5xxS34PiMinrVsTPDB96KQPpOIzyw0G3Dnh4Dk=/4Zn98nA-5ASdPvSzz-7FxyB3T3_9Oy-g96P1wliYZtc=?code=thompson&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmt-aca-up%3Frefcode%3DMT_EM_JA_WL_190906_1_2%26amount%3D10.00%26recurring%3Dtrue)
> We won't let millions of Americans have the rug ripped out from underneath them. It's time the GOP stop playing politics with our health care - Americans' lives and well-being are on the line, Peter.
>
> [Make your voice heard and demand Congress take action to protect Americans with pre-existing conditions ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/XL7dX5xxS34PiMinrVsTPDB96KQPpOIzyw0G3Dnh4Dk=/4Zn98nA-5ASdPvSzz-7FxyB3T3_9Oy-g96P1wliYZtc=?code=thompson&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmt-aca-up%3Frefcode%3DMT_EM_JA_WL_190906_1_2%26amount%3D10.00%26recurring%3Dtrue)
>
> Thanks for stepping up,
>
> Mike
>
>
>
> [](https://act.myngp.com/el/XL7dX5xxS34PiMinrVsTPDB96KQPpOIzyw0G3Dnh4Dk=/4Zn98nA-5ASdPvSzz-7FxyB3T3_9Oy-g96P1wliYZtc=?code=thompson&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmt-aca-up%3Frefcode%3DMT_EM_JA_WL_190906_1_2%26amount%3D10.00%26recurring%3Dtrue)
> * * *
> _Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/XL7dX5xxS34PiMinrVsTPDB96KQPpOIzyw0G3Dnh4Dk=/AtAuD_KZHAX4e737gmVpD0-5Vzbe-A3ptvs50UawFRs=?amount=15&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_JA_WL_190906_1_2&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_
>
> _We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital part of our campaign. However, if you want to keep supporting Mike while receiving fewer emails,[_**click here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/XL7dX5xxS34PiMinrVsTPDB96KQPpOIzyw0G3Dnh4Dk=/WQ6SiB3nTjj5Cx31g9F0qWgWGDYVn_m5P2uYknHlYrY=)_

name: Jen O'Malley Dillon
subject: Outraged
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Beto is outraged. So am I. So are all of us. Because what’s happening right now in our country is outrageous:
#
There's an old saying:
**_If you’re not outraged, you’re not paying attention._**
Beto is outraged. So am I. **So are all of us**. Because what’s happening right now in our country _is_ _outrageous_ :
* It’s outrageous that there are near-daily mass shootings and no meaningful action from Washington on gun control.

* It’s outrageous that nothing is being done about climate change, the greatest existential threat we’ve ever faced.

* It’s outrageous that immigrant families are being torn apart by the cruel policies of the Trump administration.

With all of this going on, how can you _not_ be outraged? **How can you**** _not_****turn on the news, see all of this, and think “what the *!#^?”** But we know that outrage alone doesn’t fix things. That’s why, while Beto will always call out wrongdoing, he’ll also always match it with a positive vision for making things right.
[If you’re outraged, like Beto is — but if you also want to fix all of this, like Beto does — support our campaign by making a gift of $3 (or more) today.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32466?refcode=ema20190906-53518&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=53518%2E444211%2Ew69rIT)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32466?refcode=ema20190906-53518&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=53518%2E444211%2Ew69rIT)**
With Beto in the news taking on the NRA and Donald Trump, it’s more important than ever for us to show our strength. We have to show that America is actually looking for a candidate with a little righteous anger.
Plus, we have a big FEC deadline coming up. We’ll soon have to report all our fundraising numbers to the public, so we need to show an impressive haul. We need to show everyone that the American people are outraged, and are starving for change.
[So if you’re also outraged, and if you want to actually fix all of this, make a gift now and help elect a president who shares your outrage and has plans to address these huge injustices.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32466?refcode=ema20190906-53518&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=53518%2E444211%2Ew69rIT)
Thanks for pitching in today (and don’t forget to take a deep breath now and again).
Jen O’Malley Dillon
Campaign Manager
Beto for America

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=53518%2E444211%2Ew69rIT). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Adam Hattersley
subject: Our military deserves better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hattersley for Congress
body:
This week, the Trump Administration announced that they would divert $3.6 billion dollars away from our military to fund the border wall.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9708667/96354187/-1928932247?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODc5MDVlNy1kYWQwLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wto7cYtuHpkkGRvxRovFbwqjqf8SxgP2PEErVJQy0Ns=&emci=a4b2147e-d4d0-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=687905e7-dad0-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=6767893)
---
| Hi Peter,

This week, the Trump Administration announced that they would divert $3.6 billion dollars away from our military to fund the border wall.

[**As a veteran, I simply cannot stay silent about this, and I’m hoping today you’ll join me in condemning this action by signing my campaign's petition.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9708668/96354188/-1928932247?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODc5MDVlNy1kYWQwLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wto7cYtuHpkkGRvxRovFbwqjqf8SxgP2PEErVJQy0Ns=&emci=a4b2147e-d4d0-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=687905e7-dad0-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=6767893)

Taking billions of dollars away from our troops to fund a pointless border wall (which all experts insist will do nothing to bring about effective immigration reform) is nothing short of dangerous.

While families across the country are still under threat by Hurricane Dorian, the president and his White House full of “yes” men are demonstrating that their main concern is fulfilling their own individual whims.

This is not leadership, and our country deserves better.

[**If you agree, please join me in signing my campaign’s petition and demand the administration reverse this destructive policy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9708669/96354189/-1928932247?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODc5MDVlNy1kYWQwLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wto7cYtuHpkkGRvxRovFbwqjqf8SxgP2PEErVJQy0Ns=&emci=a4b2147e-d4d0-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=687905e7-dad0-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=6767893)

-Adam
---
| Adam Hattersley is running to represent Florida's 15th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [hattersleyforcongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9708670/96354190/1902165096?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODc5MDVlNy1kYWQwLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wto7cYtuHpkkGRvxRovFbwqjqf8SxgP2PEErVJQy0Ns=&emci=a4b2147e-d4d0-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=687905e7-dad0-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=6767893)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Record 157,878,000 Employed in August
body:
"The number of people employed in the United States hit a record 157,878,000 in August, the 21st record set under President Donald Trump." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b6380a452a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Record 157,878,000 Employed in August**

“The number of people employed in the United States hit a record 157,878,000 in August, the 21st record set under President Donald Trump, according to the employment report released today by the Bureau of Labor Statistics,” Susan Jones reports for _CNS News_.

“The unemployment rate held steady at 3.7 percent. For blacks, the unemployment rate dropped to a record low of 5.5 percent last month. And for Hispanics, the unemployment rate was 4.2 percent in August, which ties the record low set earlier this year.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5b827418cd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “It’s been a lost summer for the _Washington Post_ ,” White House Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham and Principal Deputy Press Secretary Hogan Gidley write in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=13df26b385&e=3ee4985eea). “Despite record-setting accomplishments in record-setting time, data shows the news coverage of Trump has been 92% negative. The most egregious and dangerous forms of this bias thrived this summer at media outlets like the Washington Post, which routinely masquerade opinion as news.”
---
|
---
| “Ivanka Trump met Thursday with female entrepreneurs in the Argentine province of Jujuy as part of her five-day tour of South America,” [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6cd7f32752&e=3ee4985eea) reports. “The trip by U.S. President Donald Trump's daughter and special adviser is aimed at promoting a White House initiative for the economic empowerment of women. In Argentina, she participated in a micro-financing class for female entrepreneurs who have received microcredits financed by the Overseas Private Investment Corporation, or OPIC.”
---
|
---
| “A great U.S. job market for workers at small firms got a little better in August. That’s according to the latest monthly employment survey from the National Federation of Independent Business,” James Freeman writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a32850537f&e=3ee4985eea). “The news today on small business hiring is that recession is still nowhere in sight.”
---
|
---
| “The North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA) was ratified by Congress and signed by President Bill Clinton in 1993. In the 26 years since, the need to update and amend the agreement has become clear,” Gov. Eric Holcomb (R-IN) writes in the [_Courier & Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ab5e7f171&e=3ee4985eea). For example, “under USMCA, the portion of a car that needs to be produced in North America to avoid tariffs will increase from 62.5% to 75%. USMCA also requires at least 40% of parts from factories where the average wage is $16 an hour.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cddb40ec6e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=31d61a8e7c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=3f7438150f)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Margaret Good
subject: I was a first-time candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress
body:
Below, I've shared a few thoughts with you on how even the smallest actions can add up to big change. | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/T_ceyKAjMLaiGrtLLM_l7M92bR6Si8LZ3mxYrD_HCcY=/UoiqqMTdkdmakxl7CsEu_IOqMO1L27AMRcdFkgAFVN0=?em_fr_2019.09.06_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
_Below, I 've shared a few thoughts with you on how even the smallest actions can add up to big change. Even if you don't have time to read my email, [**I hope you 'll keep this message in mind and make a grassroots contribution of any size to our ultra-competitive race.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/T_ceyKAjMLaiGrtLLM_l7M92bR6Si8LZ3mxYrD_HCcY=/UoiqqMTdkdmakxl7CsEu_IOqMO1L27AMRcdFkgAFVN0=?em_fr_2019.09.06_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)_
* * *
Friends,

Last year, I was a first-time candidate.

I'd never expected to enter public service, but when my district's seat in the Florida legislature became vacant, I pushed through my doubts and fears and decided to run because I knew this was our chance to bring real change to our community. I knew that if I wanted different results from our government, I needed to help make the change.

As we built our first campaign, I found others who felt a similar pull: They were compelled to get involved -- many of them volunteering for the first time ever on a campaign -- because they, too, could no longer sit on the sidelines.

Volunteers from all over the country traveled to Sarasota to lend a hand knocking on doors. Those that couldn't be here in person called, texted, and sent postcards to my neighbors to help get the word out about the race. And thousands of supporters nationwide contributed whatever they could to help us succeed.

**Together, we defied the odds: We flipped a seat some said was unwinnable -- all because you and so many people like you stepped up to create change.**

[**Whether you 're new to our cause or a long-time supporter -- your activism and your support matters. Please consider making a contribution to help us take our momentum to Washington. We must continue making real change for hardworking families in Southwest Florida and across the country. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/T_ceyKAjMLaiGrtLLM_l7M92bR6Si8LZ3mxYrD_HCcY=/UoiqqMTdkdmakxl7CsEu_IOqMO1L27AMRcdFkgAFVN0=?em_fr_2019.09.06_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

| [Donate $10 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/T_ceyKAjMLaiGrtLLM_l7M92bR6Si8LZ3mxYrD_HCcY=/UoiqqMTdkdmakxl7CsEu_IOqMO1L27AMRcdFkgAFVN0=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.06_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) | [Donate $25 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/T_ceyKAjMLaiGrtLLM_l7M92bR6Si8LZ3mxYrD_HCcY=/UoiqqMTdkdmakxl7CsEu_IOqMO1L27AMRcdFkgAFVN0=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.06_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
---|---
[Donate $50 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/T_ceyKAjMLaiGrtLLM_l7M92bR6Si8LZ3mxYrD_HCcY=/UoiqqMTdkdmakxl7CsEu_IOqMO1L27AMRcdFkgAFVN0=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.06_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) | [Donate $100 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/T_ceyKAjMLaiGrtLLM_l7M92bR6Si8LZ3mxYrD_HCcY=/UoiqqMTdkdmakxl7CsEu_IOqMO1L27AMRcdFkgAFVN0=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.06_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
[Custom donation »](https://act.myngp.com/el/T_ceyKAjMLaiGrtLLM_l7M92bR6Si8LZ3mxYrD_HCcY=/UoiqqMTdkdmakxl7CsEu_IOqMO1L27AMRcdFkgAFVN0=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.06_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=35&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
---

Getting involved in elections at any level isn't an easy decision to make.

But I can tell you firsthand, even the smallest actions have a ripple effect and can improve the lives of others.

********[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/T_ceyKAjMLaiGrtLLM_l7M92bR6Si8LZ3mxYrD_HCcY=/UoiqqMTdkdmakxl7CsEu_IOqMO1L27AMRcdFkgAFVN0=?em_fr_2019.09.06_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)********
---

Thank you so much for your continued support, friends.

_Margaret_

clean_body: Below, I've shared a few thoughts with you on how even the smallest actions can add up to big change. | Below, I 've shared a few thoughts with you on how even the smallest actions can add up to big change. Even if you don't have time to read my email, Friends, Last year, I was a first-time candidate. I'd never expected to enter public service, but when my district's seat in the Florida legislature became vacant, I pushed through my doubts and fears and decided to run because I knew this was our chance to bring real change to our community. I knew that if I wanted different results from our government, I needed to help make the change. As we built our first campaign, I found others who felt a similar pull: They were compelled to get involved -- many of them volunteering for the first time ever on a campaign -- because they, too, could no longer sit on the sidelines. Volunteers from all over the country traveled to Sarasota to lend a hand knocking on doors. Those that couldn't be here in person called, texted, and sent postcards to my neighbors to help get the word out about the race. And thousands of supporters nationwide contributed whatever they could to help us succeed. Together, we defied the odds: We flipped a seat some said was unwinnable -- all because you and so many people like you stepped up to create change. | | ---|--- | Getting involved in elections at any level isn't an easy decision to make. But I can tell you firsthand, even the smallest actions have a ripple effect and can improve the lives of others. ******** Thank you so much for your continued support, friends. Margaret ********** Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress = Margaret Good for Congress PO Box 5073 Sarasota FL 34277 United States

body:
The Trump Administration JUST announced plans to roll back regulations on methane -- which traps about 84 times as much heat as CO2.
---
| | [**Bill Nye has a message for Donald Trump:**](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47f7/4bd7760e/410cd743/77e14c47/2117185245/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Bill+Nye+has+a+message+for+Donald+Trump&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3&source=314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3") [](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47f7/4bd7760e/410cd743/77e14c46/2117185245/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3&source=314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3") He's right: The Trump Administration JUST announced plans to roll back regulations on methane -- **which traps about 84 times as much heat as CO2.** We have a small window of time to act. Failing crops, water scarcity, and rising sea levels could displace **143 million** people by 2050. [**Add your name if you agree with Bill Nye: This administration is taking us in the WRONG direction!**](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47f7/4bd7760e/410cd743/77e14c45/2117185245/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+if+you+agree+with+Bill+Nye&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3&source=314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3") | | | [Stand with Bill >>](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47f7/4bd7760e/410cd743/77e14c44/2117185245/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Stand+with+Bill+gtgt&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3&source=314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3")
---
* * *
[](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47f7/4bd7760e/410cd743/77e14c43/2117185245/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3&source=314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3")
It's easy to see why: Just this past week Trump _skipped out_ on the G-7 climate summit with other world leaders.
Our allies might be moving ahead without us, but **the United States is the second largest emitter of carbon emissions in the world** \-- The planet can't afford for us to keep moving backwards.
[**We want to know if you 're with us: Add your name to join Bill Nye in the fight to save the future of our planet >>**](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47f7/4bd7760e/410cd743/77e14c42/2117185245/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+We+want+to+know+if+yoursquore+with+us+if&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3&source=314_EM_EN_190906_NyeMethaneTrump_U3_X3")

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: [SIGN ON] Stand up to Trump's EPA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Last week, the Trump administration announced a proposal to roll back Obama-era regulations on methane emissions--the second largest contributor to climate change. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714fc/691c9bd/6e72d735/11a7b31d/1487096921/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| Last week, the Trump Administration announced a proposal to roll back Obama-era regulations on methane emissions--the second largest contributor to climate change.

Team, I'm livid. Here's why:

When I was governor, **Colorado enacted the first statewide methane regulations in the country** , with input from all sorts of people. Our rules became a model for the nation--a huge step forward in the fight against climate change.

**Now, Donald Trump 's EPA is taking direct action that threatens to undermine climate progress in Colorado and across the country.** [**_We need your help to push back. Add your voice to this fight now._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714fc/691c9bd/6e72d735/11a7b31a/1487096921/VEsE/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/stand-up-for-climate-progress?source=em_climatepet20190906")

Friend, this proposal by Trump's EPA is so extreme that even the big oil and gas companies it's meant to help think it's a bad idea.

**Trump will only get away with this as long as the Republican Senate lets him --and so far, Cory Gardner and Mitch McConnell have left his power unchecked.**

It's only getting harder and harder to take--and maintain--the necessary steps to combat climate change. We all breathe the same air, and we _must_ step up as a country to protect it. Unlike Cory Gardner, I've brought people together to take real action against climate change, and I plan to continue to do so in the Senate.

[**_If you believe Donald Trump and his administration need to keep their hands off essential environmental regulations and take climate change seriously, sign our petition now._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714fc/691c9bd/6e72d735/11a7b31a/1487096921/VEsF/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/stand-up-for-climate-progress?source=em_climatepet20190906") We must keep fighting--thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_pet_20190906_JH_20190906-pet-JH-climatepetbump-nop_nop_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

clean_body: Last week, the Trump administration announced a proposal to roll back Obama-era regulations on methane emissions--the second largest contributor to climate change. | | | "" | Last week, the Trump Administration announced a proposal to roll back Obama-era regulations on methane emissions--the second largest contributor to climate change. Team, I'm livid. Here's why: When I was governor, Colorado enacted the first statewide methane regulations in the country , with input from all sorts of people. Our rules became a model for the nation--a huge step forward in the fight against climate change. Now, Donald Trump 's EPA is taking direct action that threatens to undermine climate progress in Colorado and across the country. "" Friend, this proposal by Trump's EPA is so extreme that even the big oil and gas companies it's meant to help think it's a bad idea. Trump will only get away with this as long as the Republican Senate lets him --and so far, Cory Gardner and Mitch McConnell have left his power unchecked. It's only getting harder and harder to take--and maintain--the necessary steps to combat climate change. We all breathe the same air, and we must step up as a country to protect it. Unlike Cory Gardner, I've brought people together to take real action against climate change, and I plan to continue to do so in the Senate. "" We must keep fighting--thank you, John "=" | | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218 Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible. name: Jay Inslee
subject: Add your name: Trump proposed a dangerous new rule
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We need to speak out about this right now.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/methane-rule/ule/?utm_source=ema_2019-09-06_methane-rule&source=ema_2019-09-06_methane-rule&utm_campaign=methane-rule&utm_medium=ema&t=3&akid=7951%2E868730%2ElngevO) Friend, President Trump tried to bury this news right before Labor Day weekend! The Trump administration laid out a plan to gut regulations on methane emissions -- one of THE biggest contributors to climate change. Trump's EPA quietly announced a proposed rule that would eliminate federal requirements on Big Oil and Gas to install technology to fix and detect methane leaks within wells, pipelines, and storage facilities. It also questions whether the EPA even has the legal authority to regulate methane as a pollutant. _Seriously_. **This is the kind of proposed rule that we must fight against, and fight hard. Methane is a huge contributor to climate change and Big Oil and Gas need MORE watchdogs, not less.** [**Make sure the Trump administration hears you loud and clear: Add your name to support more methane emission regulation right now.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/methane-rule/ule/?utm_source=ema_2019-09-06_methane-rule&source=ema_2019-09-06_methane-rule&utm_campaign=methane-rule&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=7951%2E868730%2ElngevO) | [ADD YOUR NAME!](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/methane-rule/ule/?utm_source=ema_2019-09-06_methane-rule&source=ema_2019-09-06_methane-rule&utm_campaign=methane-rule&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=7951%2E868730%2ElngevO)
---
We know this is just the latest example of the Trump administration's rollback of environmental policies -- and one more proof point in their fight to deny climate change.
From opening millions of acres of public land and water to drilling -- including our coastlines and the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge -- to weakening the _Endangered Species Act_ , there's no bar too low for this administration in terms of hurting our environment.
[**Our future is at stake here -- we need to step up now and raises our voices together to speak out against this dangerous proposed new methane rule. Add your name next to mine right now.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/methane-rule/ule/?utm_source=ema_2019-09-06_methane-rule&source=ema_2019-09-06_methane-rule&utm_campaign=methane-rule&utm_medium=ema&t=6&akid=7951%2E868730%2ElngevO)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[ADD YOUR NAME!](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/methane-rule/ule/?utm_source=ema_2019-09-06_methane-rule&source=ema_2019-09-06_methane-rule&utm_campaign=methane-rule&utm_medium=ema&t=7&akid=7951%2E868730%2ElngevO)
---

subject: Hurricane Dorian
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fceba/3eb3e2fc/513f6267/744b4f03/1986478661/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20190906_em_dorian&source=20190906_em_dorian")
---
| | We wanted to let the millions of Americans affected by Hurricane Dorian know we are thinking of you as the storm continues to threaten the Eastern United States after leaving hundreds of thousands of people hurting in its wake. For those still in the path of the storm, please listen to local emergency management officials and take proper precautions. This storm is still destructive with powerful winds, storm surge, flash flooding and the possibility of tornadoes. Please take this storm seriously. There are still life-threatening conditions. For those with flooding, without power and who have property damage, there are resources available from many nonprofits and government entities. There are also shelters open in these affected areas including those operated by the [American Red Cross](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fceba/3eb3e2fc/513f6267/744b4f02/1986478661/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.redcross.org/get-help/disaster-relief-and-recovery-services/find-an-open-shelter.html?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+American+Red+Cross&utm_campaign=20190906_em_dorian&source=20190906_em_dorian"). [Here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fceba/3eb3e2fc/513f6267/744b4f01/1986478661/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://www.usa.gov/after-disaster?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+Here&utm_campaign=20190906_em_dorian&source=20190906_em_dorian") are some resources for the next steps of your post storm recovery. We are thinking about you and your communities and we look forward to staying connected on how we can rebuild our communities together. \-- Team Julian
---
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fceba/3eb3e2fc/513f6267/744b4f00/1986478661/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20190906_em_dorian&source=20190906_em_dorian")

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fceba/3eb3e2fc/513f6267/744b4f0d/1986478661/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20190906_em_dorian&source=20190906_em_dorian"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fceba/3eb3e2fc/513f6267/744b4f0c/1986478661/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20190906_em_dorian&source=20190906_em_dorian"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: [Petition] Stop exorbitant CEO pay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d70e/6cd27893/511a461f/15870717/113008386/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | My dad was a union machinist, and he and my mom were able to buy a home, save for retirement, and help me be the first in my family to go to college on his blue collar income. Today that's pretty hard to imagine. Instead, all the wealth goes to the top and everyone else struggles to pay the bills. It's pretty obvious: the privileged and powerful have rigged our economy, and it's only getting worse. **In 2018, CEOs of America's 500 biggest companies averaged 287 times the earnings of their median workers -- up from 20 times in the 1970s. ** Hardworking Americans shouldn't be forced to live off the scraps from anyone's table. Big corporations should have an incentive to create living wage jobs for their workers, not just help their CEOs buy another vacation home. I've got a plan to turn this around, and I am asking for your help. **[Sign my petition: urge Congress to put the brakes on worker exploitation and exorbitant CEO pay in America.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d70e/6cd27893/511a461f/15870714/113008386/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/ceo-pay/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-09-ceo-pay-email")** My plan aims to reduce the gulf between worker and CEO pay. If a company insists on paying their CEO more than 30 times their median workers, they'll pay more in corporate tax. The bigger the disparity, the bigger the increase in their tax rate. You and I know that, like Senator Paul Wellstone said, we all do better when we all do better. It's not good for working families or for America when all of the wealth goes to the one percenters. **[Sign my petition: urge Congress to put the brakes on worker exploitation and exorbitant CEO pay in America.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d70e/6cd27893/511a461f/15870714/113008386/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/ceo-pay/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-09-ceo-pay-email")** _Jeff_ [Sign the Petition](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d70e/6cd27893/511a461f/15870714/113008386/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/ceo-pay/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-09-ceo-pay-email") |

name: Mark Warner
subject: Results of my fall survey:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
It's not too late to give your input on which issues the Senate should prioritize when we return to Washington next week.
|
---
| | Derek,

A few days ago, I asked you to take my fall survey and let me know which issues the Senate should prioritize when we return to Washington next week. [**If you haven 't had a chance to take it yet, it's not too late to give your input.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d10f/53d9897e/5289af08/1c8e35f0/1529195875/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fall-2019-survey-tell-us-your-thoughts-")

My team showed me the results so far, and your top issues were pretty clear. You want:
* To **secure our elections** from future foreign interference
* Progress on bipartisan, common-sense **gun safety laws**

I'm right there with you, Derek. Our nation is hurting in the wake of one mass shooting after another, and candidly, enough is enough. There are a number of common-sense gun safety reforms that Americans from across the political spectrum actually agree on. It's only the special interests and politicians like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell who are standing in the way of bipartisan action to make our communities safer.

I'm also incredibly alarmed that our elections remain vulnerable to foreign interference. This is an issue I've been fighting hard on, despite Republican obstruction in the Senate. Still, we're making headway and gradually winning the bipartisan support we need to get this done before the 2020 elections.

These are two areas where we need action immediately, and I'm planning to keep up the fight in the Senate. But right now, I want to know what issue matters to you the most. **[Derek, if you haven't taken my fall survey yet, will you weigh in before the Senate reconvenes on September 9th?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d10f/53d9897e/5289af08/1c8e35f0/1529195875/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fall-2019-survey-tell-us-your-thoughts-")**

Thanks,
Mark **** **** | ******[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d10f/53d9897e/5289af08/1c8e35ff/1529195875/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20190906db__208__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")******

clean_body: It's not too late to give your input on which issues the Senate should prioritize when we return to Washington next week. | | | Derek, A few days ago, I asked you to take my fall survey and let me know which issues the Senate should prioritize when we return to Washington next week. "-" My team showed me the results so far, and your top issues were pretty clear. You want: To secure our elections from future foreign interference Progress on bipartisan, common-sense gun safety laws I'm right there with you, Derek. Our nation is hurting in the wake of one mass shooting after another, and candidly, enough is enough. There are a number of common-sense gun safety reforms that Americans from across the political spectrum actually agree on. It's only the special interests and politicians like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell who are standing in the way of bipartisan action to make our communities safer. I'm also incredibly alarmed that our elections remain vulnerable to foreign interference. This is an issue I've been fighting hard on, despite Republican obstruction in the Senate. Still, we're making headway and gradually winning the bipartisan support we need to get this done before the 2020 elections. These are two areas where we need action immediately, and I'm planning to keep up the fight in the Senate. But right now, I want to know what issue matters to you the most. "-" Thanks, Mark ** | ** ""** ** | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:

Trump has been focused on rallying New Hampshire Republicans and since Senator Hassan only won by a fraction of a percent, we can't afford to be in a fundraising hole if we're going to protect this seat.
[**Maggie needs your help right now. Will you please give $3 or more, everyone? She 's relying on donations to emails like this one to power her campaign (not corporate special interests!) so even just a few dollars would help.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3b1/2a380d31/3dd87153/f0dec9/2844162388/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDkwNl9FT1ExLTJfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190906_EOQ1-2_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: Andrea
subject: defying the odds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
I hope you caught the email from our debate team, because I think they really get to the center of what this campaign and Tim are trying to accomplish: moving beyond just left and right and delivering results for the American people. No other candidate is putting politics aside like Tim -- and that's why he needs you with him.

It's not easy defying the odds, but we're not in this fight for easy: **[https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/seize-the-moment](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-new-and-better?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190906_2_8&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomseizethem&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190906_2_8&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190906_2_8")

_Begin Forwarded Message:_**

> October is just around the corner, folks.
>
> [**That 's why we need you to step up now and help us secure the contributions we need to make the debate.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-new-and-better?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190906_2_8&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+need+you+to+step+up+no&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190906_2_8&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190906_2_8")
>
> Tim's message has never wavered: he's prepared to debate the critical issues that impact families across the country -- but preparation alone won't guarantee that he'll make it on stage in October. That's where you come in.
>
> Being on this team from the beginning, we've witnessed firsthand how passionately Tim believes in what he's saying. His sincerity is exceeded only by his desire to do right by the American people, and let us tell you -- that's hard to come by.
>
> He's a once in a lifetime candidate, folks. It would be a shame if we didn't come together with our grassroots strength and send him to the debate stage in October.
>
> Are you with us?
>
> If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ****[Rush $3 now >>>](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-new-and-better?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190906_2_8&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Rush+ask+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190906_2_8&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190906_2_8")
>

body:
Former Chairman of the CAGOP, Frank Visco, this week announced his endorsement of Angela Underwood Jacobs for Congress. | | | [ ](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=40e5c8c611&e=ec66c3b29a)
---
| | **> > Big Endorsement News <<**
---
| **We're proud to announce that the former Chairman of the California Republican Party, Frank Visco, has endorsed Angela's campaign for Congress.**
---
| | [ ](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=e16d9e2882&e=ec66c3b29a)
---
| We are honored to have a conservative community leader like Frank Visco on our team. With our race only 6 months away, we need all the support we can get to make it across the finish line.

**, I'll level with you.**

Liberal Rep. Katie Hill and her million-dollar war chest won't be easy to beat. Angela needs the support of strong Republicans like you to stop the _over regulating_ , _over taxing_ , and _over spending_ Democrats from keeping this district in 2020.

[Please send an immediate contribution today to give Angela a chance to fight back against the wave of liberal dollars pouring into Katie Hill's pockets.](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=ef1ace32a4&e=ec66c3b29a)

We need a Congresswoman that will fight every day for our district, not for liberal mega donors and special interests.
**Will you help us WIN this race in 2020?**
[Join us by contributing a $5, $10, $25, $50, $75, $100 secure donation, or more if you can!](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=5682d60adb&e=ec66c3b29a) You can even make your contribution recur monthly to pledge your continued support.
---
| [Help Angela Win Back the 25th!](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=7f231a3a22&e=ec66c3b29a "Help Angela Win Back the 25th!")
---
| |
---
| | [ ](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=2d7557f2a2&e=ec66c3b29a)
---
**About Angela Underwood Jacobs:**

Underwood Jacobs currently serves as the regional Senior Vice President of California Bank and Trust, where she helps Californians live their _American Dream_ – purchase their first home, receive a loan to launch a small business, or save for retirement. Underwood Jacobs was the first African American woman elected to the Lancaster City Council, where she has served since 2015. She is the proud wife of a military veteran and a mother that has lived in Antelope Valley for over 25 years.

subject: This graph confirms what all of us here in Maine have been feeling: people are ready for a Senator who puts our state first.
body:
Numbers don't lie:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c01/4bef7a87/68f73113/287f1d1f/1439756406/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

_(Morning Consult)_
This graph confirms what all of us here in Maine have been feeling: it's time for a Senator who puts our state first.
Susan Collins has been in the Senate for 22 years. At one point, maybe she was different than other folks in Washington. But now she stands with corporate special interests, taking over a million dollars from the drug and insurance industries and voting to put Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court.
**We know Sara can win - Collins' approval ratings prove that Maine's Senate seat is poised to flip. But we can't do it without your help. Can we count on you?**
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign to defeat Susan Collins and elect a leader who will put Maine first. We can win this election if we all work together.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c01/4bef7a87/68f73113/287f1d1e/1439756406/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MDYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-september?refcode=em190906-full")
Democrats' path to taking back the Senate cuts right through Maine - we're the single most flippable state this cycle! We have to come through.
Let's do this,
\- Team Sara
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c01/4bef7a87/68f73113/287f1d1e/1439756406/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MDYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-september?refcode=em190906-full")****

name: Yang2020
subject: You have to see this
