body:
It’s clear that even when we blow through fundraising goals, have more grassroots supporters than many big name candidates, and continue to rise in the polls, we will still be ignored by many in the media and establishment. | [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=179%2E377263%2Eaqhiur) Team -- You have to see this. Last night, NBC News showed a graphic listing the 10 candidates who made the debate stage in September. Notice anything missing? **It’s clear that even when we blow through fundraising goals, have more grassroots supporters than many big name candidates, and continue to rise in the polls, we will still be ignored by many in the media and establishment.** But we’re not counting on them to build this campaign -- we’re counting on YOU. **That’s why we’re asking:** [Will you make one more contribution now so we can take Andrew’s message directly to voters and show everyone why he is the right candidate in this moment? We can’t count on the media to share our story -- it’s on us to build this movement.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/6262?t=2&akid=179%2E377263%2Eaqhiur) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/6263?t=3&akid=179%2E377263%2Eaqhiur)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Laboring for Hoosiers
body:
This week, we celebrated Labor Day. It’s a day dedicated to you -- the hardworking Hoosiers and Americans who go to work and power the industry....

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/laboring-for-hoosiers?e=1acd9bb3d6)
Laboring for Hoosiers

This week, we celebrated Labor Day. It’s a day dedicated to you -- the hardworking Hoosiers and Americans who go to work and power the industry of our nation, state and communities. And I’m so excited to share that because of your work and because of the leadership of President Donald Trump nationally and Governor Eric Holcomb here at home, our economy is on a roll!

Here’s just a few quick facts you might have missed:
* More than 6 million jobs have been created nationally and more than 72,500 private sector jobs have been created in Indiana since President Trump and Governor Holcomb took office.
* The unemployment rate is nearing a generational low – 3.7% nationally and even lower in Indiana at 3.4%. In fact, Indiana’s unemployment rate is below ALL of our neighboring states.
* Wages are growing, too. Wage growth has now topped 3% for the nation for an entire year.
* According to a report last week (https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2019-08-27/u-s-consumer-confidence-declined-less-than-forecast-in-august?mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , consumer confidence has climbed to its highest level in nearly 19 years, with hiring and income gains keeping Americans upbeat.

In addition to the work of Hoosiers like you, there’s no doubt that President Trump and Governor Holcomb are laboring for Hoosiers each and every day. Of course, there’s President Trump’s historic tax cuts – putting more money in Hoosier pockets – but it doesn’t stop there.

President Trump announced a big new trade deal with Japan (https://www.politico.com/story/2019/08/25/us-japan-trade-deal-g7-1474461?mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) that’s great news for Hoosier farmers and manufacturers, while Governor Holcomb launched a trade mission to Asia this week, all with the goal of bringing home more jobs and investment to Indiana (more details on that below).

Thank you for your work helping make this incredible economic growth a reality! I hope you had a great Labor Day weekend!

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer

PHOTO: Earlier this summer, Governor Holcomb joined leaders at Allison Transmission to help the company break ground on its new Innovation Center in Indianapolis, which is part of the company's plans to create 300 new Hoosier jobs! And, of course, he couldn't leave without test driving one of their rigs!
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Taking Indiana to Asia
(and Bringing Asia to Indiana)!

Another busy week for Governor Holcomb! He kicked off a two-week overseas trade mission to the Republic of Korea and Japan this week, all with the purpose of taking Indiana to Asia, and bringing Asia (and it’s jobs and investment) back home to Indiana.

He started in South Korea. Did you know that Indiana is home to at least 10 South Korea-based business establishments, like POSCO (Clark County), MotionWear (Marion County), Superior Essex (Allen, Johnson and Whitley counties), and Universal Bearings (Marshall County)? These businesses provide 1,500 jobs to Hoosiers. While in South Korea, Governor Holcomb:
* Met with South Korean Prime Minister Lee Nak-yon to discuss how Indiana can support Korean companies in Indiana.
* Visited the demilitarized zone and met with American troops stationed there.
* Visited POSCO headquarters, a steel company that is employing Hoosiers in Jeffersonville.
* Met with members of the U.S. Embassy in Seoul to discuss opportunities to continue to grow the mutually-beneficial partnership between Indiana and South Korea.

To follow along with Governor Holcomb’s trade mission, make sure to follow @GovHolcomb (https://twitter.com/GovHolcomb?mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) and @Indiana_EDC (https://twitter.com/indiana_edc?mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) on Twitter (and keep reading The Party Line each week)!
Fall Dinner 2019: Celebrating Our Military

This year's Team Holcomb Fall Dinner (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c4c6804b0d&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) is one you won't want to miss! We're excited to welcome Congressmen and combat veterans Jim Baird, Brian Mast and Dan Crenshaw as the event's special guests on October 14 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

These three American heroes have made so many sacrifices in the name of freedom. Of course, we already know Indiana's own Congressman Jim Baird, and you may remember Congressman Crenshaw from when he was unnecessarily mocked on Saturday Night Live, but this trio made national headlines when Congressman Mast's tweet (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ec3b72c460&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) "5 eyes. 5 arms. 4 legs. All American." went viral.

Help us celebrate our military by booking your tickets for the Team Holcomb Fall Dinner (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a2e05d1282&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) now!

--> Reserve your seat here <-- (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5931dde43f&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Labor Day 2019: Festivals, Parades & Petitions!

Labor Day weekend was a busy one for Republicans throughout Indiana! From festivals to parades, our team was at these events (and MORE!) to support our candidates, support our communities, and to collect petitions to get President Trump and Governor Holcomb on the ballot next year:

• North Salem Old Fashion Days
• Little Italy Festival in Clinton
• Lowell Labor Day parade
• Blueberry Festival in Plymouth
• Marshmallow Festival in Ligonier

Did we see you at one of these events? Would you like to get involved to help represent your Indiana Republican Party at an upcoming event near you? Reach out and let us know at HERE (http://indiana.gop/join-team?mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and we’ll be in touch soon!

National Federation of Republican Women Convention
Coming to Indiana!

Save the date! The National Federation of Republican Women will be hosting their convention in Indianapolis this year on September 26-29. You’re invited to join them for their opening party – hosted by our own Indiana Federation of Republican Women – the evening of September 27 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

Learn more about the convention here (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0b9a27b539&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , learn about sponsorship opportunities here (http://www.nfrw.org/convention-sponsorships?mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and register to attend the national convention here (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=97df87c215&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

Upcoming Republican Events

September 19 (http://indiana.gop/events/hamilton-county-fall-dinner?mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Hamilton County Fall Dinner
September 21 (http://indiana.gop/events/parke-county-gop-golf-scramble?mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Parke County GOP Golf Scramble

September 26 (http://indiana.gop/events/nfrw-convention?mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : National Federation of Republican Women Convention
October 14 (http://teamholcomb.gop/upcoming-events/fall-dinner?mc_cid=7add352fde&mc_eid=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Team Holcomb Fall Dinner
October 23 (http://indiana.gop/events/huntington-county-republican-party-under-dome?mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Huntington County GOP "Under the Dome"
October 28 (http://indiana.gop/events/orange-county-fall-dinner-1?mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Orange County Fall Dinner

**Have an upcoming Republican event not listed here? Let us know at info@indiana.go (mailto:info@indiana.go) p (mailto:info@indiana.go) ! **

News You Can Use

Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch talks about growing up in Evansville (https://www.tristatehomepage.com/news/local-news/lt-gov-crouch-talks-about-how-growing-up-in-evansville-has-helped-her-in-office/?mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Senator Mike Braun visited Ball State and discussed higher education costs (https://www.ballstatedaily.com/article/2019/09/news-senator-mike-braun-visit-ball-state?mc_cid=83b4c58894&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

name: James Mackler
subject: McConnell needs to DO SOMETHING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
Gun violence is a solvable issue.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa205/18d6a294/4b03bc60/26d65cce/555174096/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | As the number of fatal mass shootings in our country grows, there's no denying this is an issue that can't be ignored. Odessa and Midland, Texas are the latest communities to join so many others across the country that have been struck with grief in the wake of shootings that have taken the lives of neighbors and friends, parents and children. When families are killed while at the grocery store or children are killed at school, the tragedy is so great that it can feel unspeakable. But we can't remain silent. **We can 't sit by and do nothing.** [**_But that 's precisely what Mitch McConnell has done: nothing. Join me in demanding McConnell take immediate action to address gun violence. Add your name -> _**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa205/18d6a294/4b03bc60/26d65ccf/555174096/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/landing/jme190906m/") **Gun violence is a solvable issue.** I'm a veteran and a gun owner and I know we can protect Americans' Second Amendment rights and keep guns out of the hands of dangerous people. We need stronger background checks on all gun sales and close the gun-show loophole. The House passed a bipartisan bill to do so way back in February, but McConnell has refused to call a vote in the Senate. **In other words: McConnell is refusing to do his job.** We can't make progress on anything with McConnell as Senate Majority Leader. [**_Sign your name and tell McConnell to bring the House 's bipartisan background check legislation to a vote in the Senate immediately ->_**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa205/18d6a294/4b03bc60/26d65ccc/555174096/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/landing/jme190906m//") Thank you, James
---

|
---

---

Nancy Pelosi, Elizabeth Warren, and Joe Biden are doing _everything_ they can to defeat good conservatives in North Carolina – because they need another liberal insider for their socialist agenda.
That’s why they’re actively fighting back against my friend, Dan Bishop, in the special election currently taking place in North Carolina’s 9th Congressional District. They’re sending millions of dollars and stumping for Senator Bishop's big-government opponent, Dan McCready.
We must stand up to them.
**The choice couldn’t be clearer:** Senator Bishop is a strong, God-fearing conservative who has proven himself as a courageous leader. He’s running against a Hollywood-funded and Nancy Pelosi-backed political insider who would destroy our values in Washington.
**Furthermore, the path for Republicans to take back the majority in the U.S. House of Representatives from Democrats like Alexandria Ocasio Cortez and Nancy Pelosi runs right through the 9th District.**

name: Addisu Demissie, Cory 2020
subject: We're entering the next phase of this race, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
This race is changing and it's sink or swim time.
| | |
---
| We're entering a new phase of this race, team. Twenty candidates participated in the last DNC debate. During this next debate, we're only going to see ten and Cory's one of them. He's proven that he belongs on that stage and it's in part due to people like you that he'll be there. But, I gotta level with you, this race is changing and it's sink or swim time. **As the field narrows, we need the resources to take this campaign to the next level. We need everyone on this team to rise to the occasion.** [**This is the time to invest in our campaign. Will you make your first donation today?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190906_AD_20190906-fr-AD-6days-actives_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Unlike others, this is **Cory 's first time running for president.** He didn't enter this race with a huge network of donors all over the country. He's not a self-funding billionaire. When we say we're running an underdog campaign, we mean it. **You and us.** That's our team. [**We 're not going to win this thing unless all of us step up when it matters most. Can Cory count on you to chip in right now?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190906_AD_20190906-fr-AD-6days-actives_ndnr_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Together, we're building this grassroots campaign one donation at a time -- dollar by dollar, brick by brick. **It 's how we win. It's how we rise.** On behalf of Cory and this entire campaign, thank you for being on this team. Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190906_AD_20190906-fr-AD-6days-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b2c/5fca0d19/75b07359/2919f8ad/1588782054/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b2c/5fca0d19/75b07359/2919f8ac/1588782054/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b2c/5fca0d19/75b07359/2919f8ab/1588782054/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b2c/5fca0d19/75b07359/2919f8aa/1588782054/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b2c/5fca0d19/75b07359/2919f8a9/1588782054/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b2c/5fca0d19/75b07359/2919f8ad/1588782054/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Emily Frost
subject: Hello from Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
I wanted to reach out and tell you how your support really makes a difference for us here in Iowa, home to the first-in-the-nation caucus.
#
Let me introduce myself:
My name is Emily Frost and I’m a member of Team Beto here in Iowa.
I know you often get emails from our national team, and from Beto himself, but I wanted to reach out and tell you how your support _really_ makes a difference for us here in Iowa, home to the first-in-the-nation caucus.
**When you give to this campaign, you’re directly helping folks like me — and our entire team here in Iowa — talk directly to potential caucus-goers.** [Will you give $3 right now to help our team do even more in this critical early voting state?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32506?refcode=ema20190906-53578&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=53578%2E444211%2EtK2VTQ)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32506?refcode=ema20190906-53578&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=53578%2E444211%2EtK2VTQ)**
Our Iowa team is always growing; your donations help us recruit more team members to coordinate, organize, and spread the word. Thanks to supporters like you, we’ve opened 11 campaign offices all across the state. Because of your support, we were able to bring Beto to Des Moines for a town hall, where he had the chance to speak to and hear directly from the people:
[ ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32506?refcode=ema20190906-53578&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=53578%2E444211%2EtK2VTQ)
But, when Beto can’t be here in-person, it’s up to us to bring his message to people across Iowa — particularly to communities that are usually left out of our democracy. Right now, college students across Iowa are moving back into their dorms; your support means we will be able to organize directly on their campuses.
**[You can help our efforts to organize Iowans for the first-in-the-nation caucus by making a gift right now.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32506?refcode=ema20190906-53578&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=53578%2E444211%2EtK2VTQ)**
**I can tell you from personal experience that every dollar counts.** Every single contribution helps us get out there and talk to more voters. Every gift from a generous supporter like you means we can build this campaign and put together the movement that will help Beto win — first here in Iowa, then across the country.
**[This is your chance to make a difference for our team right now — please make a gift of $3 (or more!) to our campaign so we can get the word out and talk to more voters here in Iowa.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32506?refcode=ema20190906-53578&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=53578%2E444211%2EtK2VTQ)**
Thanks!
Emily Frost
Iowa Regional Organizing Director
Beto for America
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32506?refcode=ema20190906-53578&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=53578%2E444211%2EtK2VTQ)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=53578%2E444211%2EtK2VTQ). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Andy Beshear
subject: a message from the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Your energy, your enthusiasm, and yes -- your financial contributions -- are keeping Jacqueline and me going strong.
|
---

| | Peter,

Hello from the campaign trail!

I'm staying extremely busy, traveling across Kentucky and talking to as many people as I can about the issues that matter most to them. But I wanted to take just a minute to thank you for your support. Your energy, your enthusiasm, and yes -- your financial contributions -- are keeping Jacqueline and me going strong.

**_I also wanted to let you know we 're just hours away from our biggest deadline so far._** Our fundraising period comes to an end at midnight tonight and we'll have to report our progress. _These are public numbers, Peter._

**Can you make a donation today to give us a boost as we head into the campaign 's final stretch? This is such an important deadline that a group of supporters have agreed to DOUBLE every donation made before midnight.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5
($10 with match!)](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557aab/ad6dc73/14c33871/db47875/451346056/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septreporting?express_lane=true&refcode=20190906.2nd__243__&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10

($50 with match!)](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557aab/ad6dc73/14c33871/db47809/451346056/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septreporting?express_lane=true&refcode=20190906.2nd__243__&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50
($100 with match!)](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557aab/ad6dc73/14c33871/db4780f/451346056/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septreporting?express_lane=true&refcode=20190906.2nd__243__&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100
($200 with match!)](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557aab/ad6dc73/14c33871/db4780d/451346056/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septreporting?express_lane=true&refcode=20190906.2nd__243__&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT
(doubled with match!)](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557aab/ad6dc73/14c33871/db47803/451346056/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septreporting?refcode=20190906.2nd__243__")** Raising money from grassroots donors -- especially in a race this important and this close -- is critical if we want to reach people in every corner of Kentucky.

And since only a few hours are left before this deadline, we're in a big push to meet our $10,000 goal by midnight. We appreciate _every single donation_ , no matter the size. **So please chip in here and have your support matched dollar-for-dollar:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septreporting](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557aab/ad6dc73/14c33871/db47801/451346056/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septreporting?refcode=20190906.2nd__243__&amount=5")**

Thanks again for your support.

\-- Andy | | **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557aab/ad6dc73/14c33871/db47801/451346056/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septreporting?refcode=20190906.2nd__243__&amount=5")**

To comply with state law, we must use best efforts to obtain, maintain, and submit the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals and their spouses, when personal contributions exceed $100 per election cycle. Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019. Lindy Karns, Treasurer._

Stand With Mark Kelly is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55.
For 2020, we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating Trump and turning Arizona blue. We recruited astronaut Mark Kelly to run for Arizona's US Senate seat, are working to win a key Arizona Congressional seat and to flip both houses of the Arizona State Legislature.
If you'd like to support the Stand With Mark Kelly Campaign, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47f5/4bd7760e/41093e8a/77e144f0/1315860770/VEsHAQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footerdmk?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=14+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190906_KellyPollUpdate_U1_X2&source=314_EM_FR_190906_KellyPollUpdate_U1_X2")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Petitions (via Team Weld)
subject: [action required] primaries and caucuses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCNSFH_stLAmFwFa6oGJ2M58&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190906_eng_2&n=1) Friend — we found out today that at least four state parties are considering _**canceling**_ their presidential primary or caucus in 2020. This move is unconscionable, anti-democratic, and is a ploy by Donald Trump and his cronies to _**silence your voice**_ in the upcoming presidential election. It’s clear that Donald Trump would rather be crowned president than be elected it — but that doesn’t mean we have to sit down and take it. That’s why we’re emailing you tonight — [**will you sign our petition right now demanding that all state parties hold primaries or caucuses in 2020?** **Because right now it might only be South Carolina, Nevada, Arizona, and Kansas; but soon your state could be next.**](https://www.weld2020.org/canceling_primaries?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190906_eng_2&n=2) | | [SIGN THE PETITION ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/canceling_primaries?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190906_eng_2&n=3)

clean_body: | Friend — we found out today that at least four state parties are considering canceling their presidential primary or caucus in 2020. This move is unconscionable, anti-democratic, and is a ploy by Donald Trump and his cronies to silence your voice in the upcoming presidential election. It’s clear that Donald Trump would rather be crowned president than be elected it — but that doesn’t mean we have to sit down and take it. That’s why we’re emailing you tonight — | | — Team Weld | Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
